short_summary: Iran deal imminent, gang leader killed
rationale: Trump claims Iran deal signing Sunday — if true, a significant foreign policy development affecting oil markets and Middle East stability; Tren de Aragua leader killed in US airstrike is a continuation of established pattern.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal: Trump says Sunday signing, Tehran contradicts
top_events.summary: If signed, a US-Iran deal would be a major foreign policy milestone affecting oil prices, Middle East stability, and US military posture — but Tehran's contradiction keeps outcome uncertain.

top_events.title: US kills Tren de Aragua gang leader in airstrike
top_events.summary: US airstrike kills the leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang — continuation of Trump administration's aggressive anti-gang military posture, no new escalation pattern.

top_events.title: Anthropic AI tools suspended over US government security concerns
top_events.summary: Federal suspension of new Anthropic AI tools continues as active policy — ongoing background concern for US tech sector and AI governance, no new qualitative shift.
